questions.statement: Which of the following statements is not true about psychoanalysis?
options: It is a technique that is used to analyze the mind /
It is a therapy that is found in neurosis /
It is used in clinical settings and clinical experiments /

questions.statement: <span style="">One of the environmental factors affecting learning is-</span>
How can teachers encourage children to become intrinsically motivated learners?
options: By promoting them to copy the teacher /
By inculcating a sense of joy in learning /

questions.statement: Which statement is correct about cognition and emotions?
options: Cognition and emotions are independent of each other. /
<span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">Cognition&nbsp;</span>and emotions are intertwined and influence each other. /
<span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">Cognition</span> has an impact on emotions, but emotions do not affect cognition. /
Emotions have an impact on <span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">cognition</span>, but c<span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">ognition&nbsp;</span>does not affect emotions. /

questions.statement:
<p>Assertion (A): A child of 9 years tries to develop interpersonal skills by interacting with their peer groups, teachers, etc.</p>

<p>Reason (R): &quot;Conventional level of morality&quot; is the level in which every child tries to please others.</p>
options: <span style="">Both (A) and (R) are true and (R) is the correct explanation of (A).&nbsp;</span> /
<span style="">Both (A) and (R) are true but (R) is not the correct explanation of (A).</span> /
<span style="">(A) is true but (R) is false.&nbsp;</span> /

questions.statement: A school will become a true second home for the child if _______________.
options: Its environment resembles that of the home environment&nbsp; /
Meals are also provided in school&nbsp; /
It helps in the academic development of the child /
It generates the desire to learn&nbsp; /

questions.statement: Which developmental theory was based on how children learn by observing and imitating others&#39; behavior?
